top_signals.title: SQM Raises Lithium Sales Guidance as Recovery Gathers Pace
top_signals.summary: SQM reported a sharp increase in first-quarter profit and raised its annual lithium sales forecast as robust demand from battery storage systems helps drive a recovery in prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Spanish police raid offices of ruling Socialist party
top_signals.summary: New probe into allegations of judicial interference deepens crisis engulfing prime minister
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Yardeni Says ‘FEMO’ Is Key to a Rally Built on Reality, Not Hype
top_signals.summary: Veteran market strategist Ed Yardeni of Yardeni Research dismissed concerns that US stocks are in a bubble, arguing the rally is driven by “fabulous earnings momentum” rather than speculation.

top_signals.title: Doctors in England set to go on strike in June
top_signals.summary: Walkout over pay by British Medical Association would be 16th in three years

top_signals.title: Lululemon shakes up board as part of truce with founder
top_signals.summary: Athleisure brand will add two of Chip Wilson’s three picks in exchange for 18-month pause in agitations
